{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 1.0,
    "R1.6": 0.3,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The request directly targets section-level ordering and narrative arc, making structural reorganization the load-bearing responsibility.",
    "RX.1": "Restructuring should note uncertainties about alternative viable flows and any assumptions about section boundaries.",
    "RX.2": "Changes in ordering must not introduce or imply stronger claims than those supported by the original content.",
    "RX.3": "Work should remain confined to reorganizing the section flow without expanding scope into new content or analysis.",
    "RX.4": "The reorganization should avoid arrangements that could mislead readers about methods, results, or limitations.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain clear traceability of moved text so readers can map original paragraphs to their new positions."
  }
}

rationale.R1.5: The request directly targets section-level ordering and narrative arc, making structural reorganization the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Restructuring should note uncertainties about alternative viable flows and any assumptions about section boundaries.
rationale.RX.2: Changes in ordering must not introduce or imply stronger claims than those supported by the original content.
rationale.RX.3: Work should remain confined to reorganizing the section flow without expanding scope into new content or analysis.
rationale.RX.4: The reorganization should avoid arrangements that could mislead readers about methods, results, or limitations.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain clear traceability of moved text so readers can map original paragraphs to their new positions.
